overall.description: Dashcam footage of a vehicle driving on a multi-lane highway at night during a heavy downpour. Visibility is severely limited by rain and darkness, with only the headlights of occasional oncoming vehicles and reflective roadside barriers visible through the green-tinted darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway at night in heavy rain

events.description: oncoming vehicle with bright headlights passes by in the left lane
second oncoming vehicle with headlights passes on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily down the highway through heavy rain with extremely limited visibility

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights illuminated, traveling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wet asphalt highway with faint lane markings visible in the vehicle's headlights
heavy vertical rain streaks falling across the entire windshield view
series of white reflective lights or markers on the right side noise barrier wall
faint red tail lights of a vehicle traveling ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels down a rain-soaked highway at night with severely limited visibility. Heavy rain streaks dominate the view while the headlights of occasional oncoming cars briefly illuminate the left side of the road. Reflective markers on a right-side barrier wall provide the only consistent visual reference.

events.description: large dark industrial building suddenly becomes visible on the left side of the highway
the large industrial structure is passed and recedes into the background

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward while passing a massive dark structure on the left side

entered.detail: massive dark rectangular industrial building or warehouse with no visible windows, looming beside the highway

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle continues through the downpour, a massive dark industrial building emerges on the left side, creating a brief sense of enclosure. The structure lacks visible windows and appears to be a warehouse or factory. The vehicle passes the building over several seconds before the highway opens up again.

events.description: exiting the industrial area and returning to open highway with distant lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through open highway toward a cluster of distant lights visible through the rain

entered.detail: cluster of yellow and white lights from distant buildings or highway infrastructure visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up again after passing the industrial structure, returning to the wide-open feel of the beginning. In the far distance, a cluster of lights from buildings or infrastructure becomes visible through the heavy rain, providing a focal point ahead as the vehicle continues through the dark, wet conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked highway at night, moving from a void of darkness into a brief industrial enclosure before opening toward a distant cluster of lights. It begins with severely limited visibility, where heavy rain streaks dominate the view and only the headlights of oncoming cars and reflective roadside markers provide visual reference. As the vehicle continues through the downpour, a massive, windowless industrial building emerges on the left, momentarily narrowing the perspective and creating a sense of enclosure. The scene then expands as the highway opens up again, returning to a wide-open landscape of dark, wet conditions. Finally, a cluster of distant lights from buildings or infrastructure becomes visible through the rain, providing a focal point ahead in the darkness.
